description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile sports car with a dark, glossy exterior finish and a muscular, angular body design reminiscent of classic American muscle cars. The front features a wide, aggressive grille flanked by four round headlights and a pronounced hood scoop, suggesting high performance. The side profile reveals two doors, large alloy wheels with a five-spoke design, and tinted windows, emphasizing its sporty character. At the rear, a continuous red taillight bar spans the width of the car, and the trunk area is clean and streamlined without a visible spoiler. The car sits close to the ground, enhancing its aerodynamic appearance and road-hugging stance. The overall design suggests a focus on speed, style, and urban street presence.
description: A dark, glossy sports car with a muscular, angular body, wide grille, and five-spoke alloy wheels. Its low stance and streamlined design evoke classic muscle car aesthetics.
description_view_0: Front view shows a wide grille, four round headlights, and a pronounced hood scoop.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the two-door coupe profile, large five-spoke wheels, and tinted windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a continuous red taillight bar and a clean, spoiler-free trunk.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the coupe shape and wheel design.
